transcript: so excited about the progress of the internet that they invested in pretty much any tech company with a pulse they stopped caring about whether or not a company was profitable or at least could eventually become profitable common sense became a rarity from 1997 to march 2000 prices went up about five times only to go down five times and return to their pre-boom levels from 2000 to 2002 a drop which was also exacerbated by the terrorist attacks of september 11 2001
